name: squid-codex
description: Codex adapter for Squid's opinionated engineering and research agent-team workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering and research workflows adapted for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex-facing adapters for Squid's scaffold, plan, implement-night, research, review, refactor, and support workflows. The adapters preserve the original Squid contracts while translating Claude-specific tool syntax into Codex-native execution.
defaultPrompt: Use $scaffold to bootstrap a new service.
Use $plan to groom a feature into an approved Tasks Plan.
